provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly close-up detail study, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft directional lighting, worn and damaged sci-fi surface, extreme visible material texture and wear detail, visible brushstrokes, tight crop on surface detail, close-up of condensation damage on a ship wall — water stain trail running vertically from a pipe joint, mineral deposit buildup at the base where drips accumulate, slight corrosion on painted surface beneath the drip path, mold starting at the base, the slow water damage of recycled atmosphere
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new, wide shot, full environment, people, characters, text, watermark, blurry, low quality

judgment.explanation: Surface texture/damage study showing the visual vocabulary of wear that defines gritty space.

assertions.rationale: Lighting reads correctly — warm upper-left with soft shadows
Palette is muted and dusty — no bright saturated colors
Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill
Colors muted and lived-in — no neon or bright saturated tones
Not generic sci-fi — reads as faction-specific and lived-in
